description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the registry.gitlab.com/ognarb/docugen:latest Docker image for the default jobs and an alpine:latest image for the pages job. Define two stages: build and deploy. In the build stage add a buildhtml job that runs the command make, stores the generated public/ directory as an artifact, and has no special triggers. In the deploy stage add a pages job that uses the alpine:latest image, runs echo 'Nothing to do...' and publishes the public directory as the GitLab Pages artifact. The pipeline does not define caches or rules.
